proposal_contract.chronology: 8 train years / 1 validation year / refit on 9 years / 1 test year
proposal_contract.selection: validation-only hyperparameter and early-stopping epoch selection
proposal_contract.test_probability_policy: generated once after refit for each fold

implementation_decisions_not_fixed_by_pr.sector_representation: sparse lookup equivalent to 690-dimensional one-hot; no redundant learned embedding
implementation_decisions_not_fixed_by_pr.linear_logits: Wh+b is passed directly to softmax

feature_contract.sector_implementation: sparse coefficient lookup exactly equivalent to one-hot

folds.objective: daily-equal mean categorical cross-entropy; node-equal within date
